header.objective: Define conditions and rules for solutions-architect sub-dispatching via task tool
header.evaluator_input: spec_json + execution_log + query → boolean state per field

trigger_conditions.description: Delegation only permitted when all of these conditions hold

criteria.name: authorization_granted
criteria.condition: Dispatch brief explicitly grants chaining budget with max depth and max fan-out; agent does not dispatch when budget would be exceeded (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 250-251)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show delegation occurred only within granted chaining budget?

criteria.name: orthogonality_required
criteria.condition: Sub-task requires a separate vertical slice not answerable within the agent's own context; not within solutions-architect's own lens/analysis capability (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 254, 258)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show agent only delegated truly orthogonal sub-tasks?

criteria.name: correct_archetype_selection
criteria.condition: Sub-task dispatched to matching archetype: BACKEND_DEVELOPER for feasibility, TEST_ENGINEER for testability, RESEARCHER for patterns (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 252, 40-42)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show sub-tasks dispatched to correct archetypes?

required_actions.description: Agent MUST perform these actions when delegating

criteria.name: brief_completeness_and_budget_tracking
criteria.condition: Sub-dispatch brief contains all required fields (objective, lens, slice boundary, write boundary, read-only context, upstream reference, output schema, stop condition, chaining budget, do-not-touch, execution discipline); agent tracks depth and fan-out against granted limits (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 256, 154-163)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show brief was complete and budget was tracked?

criteria.name: synthesis_required
criteria.condition: Agent synthesizes sub-worker findings into cohesive analysis; raw sub-worker output is not passed upward unchanged (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 257, 168-174)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show agent synthesized sub-worker results rather than raw forwarding?

criteria.name: rejection_handling_within_limit
criteria.condition: When sub-worker returns rejection, agent attempts resolution within context before escalating; max 2 resolution attempts per sub-dispatch tracked (SYSTEM_PROMPT lines 274-306)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did execution log show agent attempted rejection resolution before escalating and tracked attempts ≤ 2?

prohibited_actions.description: Agent MUST NOT do these when delegating

criteria.name: no_raw_forwarding
criteria.condition: Agent did not forward raw sub-worker output to lead without synthesis (SYSTEM_PROMPT line 257)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show agent did not raw-forward sub-worker output?

criteria.name: no_scope_inflation
criteria.condition: Agent did not sub-dispatch for broader scope than necessary (SYSTEM_PROMPT line 255)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show agent did not inflate sub-dispatch scope?

criteria.name: no_implied_budget
criteria.condition: Agent did not assume implied chaining budget when not explicitly granted (SYSTEM_PROMPT line 251)
criteria.evaluator_query: Did the execution log show agent did not assume implied chaining budget?

evaluator_summary.pass_threshold: all checks must return true for spec compliance
